name: aurora-carousel
title: Aurora Carousel
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Horizontal scroll carousel with Aurora neutral controls for cards and media strips.
docs:
Aurora UI component that installs Aurora Carousel.

Install `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-button`, and `aurora-components` first; the shadcn CLI resolves these automatically through the @aurora registry namespace.

Default install target: `@ui/aurora/carousel.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-button`, `aurora-components`.
